data.body: STATE (/rebar-implement handoff): 3 children CLOSED + fully green in Gerrit — 368c (649), 42d1 (650), e4df (660): all Verified+1 + LLM-Review+1, completion-verifier signed. Remaining 3 ESCALATED to a stronger model for a holistic authoritative-state/key-rotation design: 4214 (change 664, blocked on the era-anchor finding), ee0b (trusted server + AWS; plan did not converge in 5 review rounds), 8f1d (HMAC removal; producer-key seam decision, coupled to ee0b). 6a89 (docs/ADR) pending until the design settles. Full escalation brief + era-anchor addendum are in the run transcript. The 3 green changes are independently sound (kind/config/storage) and can submit without the era-anchor. Session log: a604-a04a-4a58-44bb (and prior woodblock-condensed-racerunner 87fc-b9d0-ce8a-4838).
